overrides.expect: \frac {1}{2 a} \int - u ^ {2} (x, a) d x \leq \iint_ {a / 2} ^ {a} \left(\frac {3 u ^ {2}}{2 y ^ {2}} + \frac {1}{2} u _ {y} ^ {2}\right) d y d x \leq \iint_ {T _ {a}} \left(\frac {3}{2} \frac {u ^ {2}}{y ^ {2}} + \frac {1}{2} u _ {y} ^ {2}\right) d x d y. $}
overrides.new: \frac{1}{2 a} \int - u^{2}(x, a) d x \leq \iint_{a / 2}^{a} \left(\frac{3 u^{2}}{2 y^{2}} + \frac{1}{2} u_{y}^{2}\right) d y d x \leq \iint_{T_{a}} \left(\frac{3}{2} \frac{u^{2}}{y^{2}} + \frac{1}{2} u_{y}^{2}\right) d x d y.

overrides.expect: \iint_ {T ^ {a}} \left(u _ {y} ^ {2} - \frac {u ^ {2}}{4 y ^ {2}}\right) d x d y \geq - \frac {1}{2 a} \int u ^ {2} (x, a) d x. $}
overrides.new: \iint_{T^{a}} \left(u_{y}^{2} - \frac{u^{2}}{4 y^{2}}\right) d x d y \geq - \frac{1}{2 a} \int u^{2}(x, a) d x.
